pages.text: $(o)"All eighteen threads can crown a king — but he who is crowned is first imprisoned."$()$(br2)$(l)$(#FFFFFF)Omnimancers$() are the confluence of every school, and the highest threshold of the civilization.

pages.title: Creed
pages.text: $(l)Omnimancer$() has no precepts — they consider $(l)precepts themselves$() a limitation.$(br2)Their only motto: $(o)"I am the vessel of Transcendence"$()$(br2)Element: $(l)mastery of all eighteen$(); no minor affinities — for them, every element is primary.

pages.title: History
pages.text: Members are vanishingly few — fewer than twenty in recorded history. Each must $(l)graduate$() from another school first, mastering at least four distinct high-tier elements.$(br2)The cost is enormous: an Omnimancer is omnipotent, but never the absolute peak in any single domain. The civilization's final verdict: $(o)"The omnimaster is no master — only the broad-hearted may bear it."$()
